generated_oml:
instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architecture visualization and description of the Lab Scale Gantry Crane digital twin."
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for version control of the digital twin codebase."
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization platform for deploying digital twin services."
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based gantrylib module for C4 Containers."
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database for storing operational metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Mosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time data communication."
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard for system monitoring and visualization."
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for creating CAD models of the gantry crane."
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella tool using Arcadia method for system architecture modeling."
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python program that interfaces with crane controllers to capture operational state data."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing Angle Encoder for measuring hoist swing dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer for measuring wind speed."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data for swing angle sensor readings."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data for wind speed measurements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CartMotorCommandData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OptimalControlService
]

instance HoistMotorCommandData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OptimalControlService
]

instance ElectromagnetCommandData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OptimalControlService
]

instance CartMotorCommandDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data for cart motor command signals."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorCommandData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance HoistMotorCommandDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data for hoist motor command signals."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorCommandData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance ElectromagnetCommandDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data for electromagnet command signals."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ElectromagnetCommandData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model for geometric representation of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Grafana
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model to simulate crane motion dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal control of crane movements."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for historical data logging of operational metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLogInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time data visualization for system monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for fault detection for anomaly identification."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for path planning using the kinematic model."

]

]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

    base:desc "Insight for continuous validation of synchronization between physical and digital models."

    base:desc "Insight for trajectory planning in crane movement."

    base:desc "Commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are processed by the Control Application, which uses the Physical Crane Interface to control the crane. The document does not specify command types, message formats, validation, authentication, feedback systems, or command execution confirmation details."

    base:desc "The architecture is visualized using the C4 Model [5] with context and container diagrams to describe component integration and system structure."
]

    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculating distance metrics against an acceptable threshold to ensure model accuracy and trigger corrective actions if discrepancies exceed limits."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate via MQTT protocol using an MQTT Broker. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency specifications, reliability mechanisms, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar adheres to the AutomationML standard for digital twin modeling, while other exemplars adopt ad-hoc approaches without commercial digital twin framework compliance."
